changes.explanation: Projects known incidents to the required id and owner fields while preserving the missing-incident signal.
Maps the service missing-incident signal to the stable 404 response while retaining successful handler responses.
Adds independently runnable unittest coverage for service projection, missing incidents, and direct public handler responses.
